productDisplayName: Biotique Women Bio Carrot SPF 40 Sunscream
description: This nutrient-rich cream is blended with pure carrot oil, extracts of carrot seed and lodhra bark, quince seed and aloe vera to keep skin soft, fair and moisturized in the sun. Protects skin with broad spectrum SPF 40 UVA/UVB sunscreen.Skin type- For All SkinUsage- Apply liberally before sun exposure. Reapply, as needed after swimming or perspiring activities. Helps reduce the skin aging, skin cancer and other harmful effects of the sun.
